integrity.signed_with_cosign: ready — triggered when COSIGN_PUSH_REF is set

network.firewall: none in-image; caller applies nftables/iptables on host if desired

cves.note: scan runs during build.sh when trivy is on PATH; build fails on HIGH/CRITICAL. Results not yet measured — user runs first local build.

tradeoffs: Alpine musl over Debian slim for size. Self-contained trimmed invariant-globalization over NativeAOT to avoid reflection-audit work in v1. tini over PLang-as-PID-1 because PLang lacks signal-handling code. No runtime shell: tini execs plang directly; integrity checks moved to build-time rootfs audit. In-repo zip over download per user direction. Base digests resolved at build time (not committed in Containerfile) — captured in build-record.json per build.
next_steps: 1) User runs ./container/build.sh locally with real plang-{amd64,arm64}.zip to fill measurements.md and trivy counts. 2) Verify reproducibility (two runs → same digest). 3) v2: custom seccomp from strace; AppArmor/SELinux profiles; optional NativeAOT variant (needs reflection audit). 4) v3+: bootable appliance with dm-verity + Secure Boot + UKI.
